# Copilot Instructions for Soughbreighittee

## Project Overview
Soughbreighittee is a project focused on sobriety and recovery assistance. The name appears to be a creative spelling of "sobriety" and the project's mission is to help people "get sober."

## Development Guidelines

### Code Style & Standards
- Follow Python PEP 8 style guidelines for any Python code
- Use meaningful variable and function names that are clear and descriptive
- Write clean, readable code with appropriate comments for complex logic
- Maintain consistency with existing code patterns in the repository

### Project Structure
- This is currently a minimal repository with basic structure
- Any new Python code should follow standard project organization
- Use appropriate directory structure (src/, tests/, docs/, etc.) as the project grows
- Keep configuration files in the root directory where appropriate

### Sensitive Content Considerations
- This project deals with sobriety and recovery, which are sensitive topics
- Be mindful of language and approach when working on features
- Avoid stigmatizing language or approaches
- Focus on supportive, encouraging, and evidence-based solutions
- Respect privacy and confidentiality concerns that may arise

### Dependencies & Environment
- The project currently has a Python-focused .gitignore
- Use virtual environments for Python development
- Keep dependencies minimal and well-documented
- Update requirements.txt or pyproject.toml as dependencies are added

### Testing & Quality
- Write comprehensive tests for any new functionality
- Consider edge cases, especially those related to user input and data handling
- Ensure any user-facing features are accessible and user-friendly
- Test with sensitivity to the target audience's needs

### Documentation
- Update README.md as the project evolves
- Document API endpoints, configuration options, and usage examples
- Include setup instructions for new contributors
- Maintain changelog for significant updates

### Security & Privacy
- Handle any personal or health-related data with extreme care
- Implement appropriate data protection measures
- Follow security best practices for any web-facing components
- Consider HIPAA compliance if health information is involved

## Contribution Guidelines
- Make small, focused commits with clear commit messages
- Test changes thoroughly before submitting
- Consider the impact on end users who may be in vulnerable situations
- Prioritize reliability and stability over complex features
